entry.title: Public archive for Delving Bitcoin
entry.summary:
The newly established mirror of delvingbitcoin.org is operational and can be accessed at [this link](https://mirror.b10c.me/delvingbitcoin-org/). This mirror effectively retains the content originally hosted on DelvingBitcoin.org by utilizing a `discourse-archive` tool, which is designed to archive discussions from various online forums. For those interested in the technical details or considering similar implementations, the source code for this tool is available on GitHub and can be viewed [here](https://github.com/0xB10C/discourse-archive/blob/93061b09f9d5fbaaeaa0261300302e069563cc22/mirror.py).
Furthermore, an archived instance of a specific discussion about Bitcoin, dated September 5, 2023, is also available and provides insight into the topics covered at that time. The link to this archive is [here](https://mirror.b10c.me/delvingbitcoin-org/2023-09-05-public-archive-for-delving-bitcoin-id87.html). The mirroring process is dynamic, with updates occurring every few hours, ensuring the information remains current and accessible. However, it's important to note that the current version of the mirroring tool does not support archiving images found within the posts. Plans are underway to upgrade the tool to include this feature, thereby enhancing the comprehensiveness of the archived material.
